user.description: Add ProCiv Madeira alerts to Home Assistant.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch alerts from procivmadeira.pt (5–1440 minutes).
data_description.url: URL to fetch alert data from. Leave as default unless you are using a local mirror or alternative source.
